title: Zona Franca
overview: In Patagonia, in the heart of Chile's Strait of Magellan province, a gold prospector, a truck driver, and a young security guard cross paths with tourists in search of the ends of the earth. Amidst the debris of history, grandiose landscapes, and shopping malls, they reveal what does not appear in tour operator brochures: a violence deeply rooted in this land, which comes to light when a strike paralyzes the region.
